text: Morning Jarvis. Can you give me a quick briefing for Sunday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, April 13. No work meetings today. You have neighborhood BBQ at Dave's place and Ethan's soccer practice scheduled.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick update: We went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. Ethan is practicing Jingle Bells for the upcoming piano recital. Always coordinate calendars for these.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: That's a big step. He's making fast progress. I can set a practice timer to help him prepare. Go Frisco FC!
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick update: Planning our weekly meals today. We want to try a new vegetarian chili recipe. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Logged that. Let's organize the menu. Great healthy option. I've added beans and canned tomatoes to the list. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Listening to a podcast in the garage. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. Good way to wrap up the day. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Jarvis, Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. That sounds like a sweet moment. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that the lawn mower is having issues starting. The garbage disposal is jammed with a cherry pit. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Logged that. Let's get that resolved. Safety first: turn off power under the sink, then use the hex wrench. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick log: Planning a street block party soon. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. Good to stay in touch with everyone.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. I've mapped the locations. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update: Ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Lily blew bubbles without crying during her swim lessons. Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Understood. Busy day for sports! That's a major swim milestone! Her confidence is really building. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Jarvis, Prepping school lunches for the week. Packing turkey sandwiches and apples for Ethan. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Understood. Healthy choices are great. Looks balanced. I can set a morning reminder to grab it from the fridge. Enjoy the grilling tonight!
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick update: Enjoying a cold beer on the deck. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Sure thing! Personal time is valuable. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. Ethan and Marcus Nguyen are playing in our backyard. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Screen time is always a negotiation. Playdates are great for Ethan. I can add snack shopping to the Target list. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: The smart-home hub is acting up today. We are planning a garage clean-up day this weekend. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Interesting. I can help troubleshoot that. I'll add heavy-duty storage bins to the Costco list to help organize. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick update: Played golf with Jake Morrison today. My golf driving was terrible but had a great catch-up. Good to stay in touch with everyone.
title: Social Update

text: Sure thing! Social breaks are great. Jake is a great friend. Did you discuss the Naperville trip? I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update before bed, logging the journal. Good weekend progress on home projects. Barbecue went well and everyone liked the dinner. Barbecue went well and everyone liked the dinner. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal summary recorded. Have a peaceful night.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
